creator: iwtcex@gmail.com
text:
(In reply to Slawomir Wojciech Wojtczak from comment #16)

> 010c:err:winediag:wined3d_dll_init The GLSL shader backend has been disabled. You get to keep all the pieces if it breaks.

That line looks moderately suspicious. Check Software\\Wine\\Direct3D and Software\\Wine\\AppDefaults registry keys.
